title: GastroMod
description:
A special mix of absurdity and realism!

new food, armor, weapons, potions, mechanics and crafts. Interesting innovations created solely for entertainment purposes and for the sake of a joke for friends.
body:
## A special mix of absurdity and realism!
**The player will try all the variety of new foods and features.**

**New items:**
- Kvass
- Yeast
- Foggy potion
- Sour cream
- Salt
- Gastritis potion
- Gastritis essence
- Sour cream and onion chips
- Pickled fish
- Baked pickled fish
- Gastritis sword
- Gastritis pickaxe
- Gastritis axe
- Gastritis pickaxe
- Gastritis armor
- Borscht with sour cream
- Beer
- Plov

**New blocks:**
- Halite
- Kvass block

**New functions:**
- Crafting new items
- Ability to create new potions
- New smelting recipes
- Effects from different foods
_
The mod is still in development, changes are possible_
